en: In my experience, this approach works well.
ru: По моему опыту, этот подход работает хорошо.
explanation: A confident way to back up a technical opinion without sounding arrogant.

en: The most important thing is to stay calm.
explanation: Useful for behavioural questions about pressure or incidents.

en: It depends on the business requirements.
explanation: A strong answer to open-ended design questions — shows you think about context.

en: My goal is to help developers grow.
explanation: A go-to sentence for team-lead and mentoring questions.
Frames a failure story with humility instead of blame.
